text:
is a pamphlet sold in some Japanese cinemas when the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone was released. It was created and sold by khara inc. on 31 October 2007.

Overview

The pamphlet consists of many interviews and explanations around the creation of the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone. Several excerpts from storyboards, sketches and production drawings to better understand the various explanations are provided. The cover was illustrated by Takeshi Honda.

Contents

Reprint of the statement by Hideaki Anno 
The Implication of "REBUILD of EVANGELION"
How to Rebuild EVA: 1.0
The Scene
Structures of TOKYO-III 
Staff Credits

References

 

 

fr:Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone (brochure)
